word: H428 - אֵלֶּה - ʼêl-leh - ale'-leh - An- other; one sort

sections.paragraph:
Original: אלּה

Transliteration: 'êlleh

Phonetic: ale'-leh

BDB Definition:

  1. these
    1. used before antecedent
    2. used following antecedent

Origin: prolonged from H411

TWOT entry: 92

Part(s) of speech:
